attributes.action: No EU rules to be applied to the UK without Parliamentary debate and vote.
attributes.additional_details: The current UK government want to introduce a controversial bill that will allow EU rules to be imported on to the UK statute book with little or no parliamentary scrutiny. This is anti democratic and should not be allowed by any UK government. The country voted in favour of Brexit in a democratic referendum. To try and impose EU rules and law on the UK goes against that vote by the public.
attributes.background: No EU laws or rules should be applied to the UK without proper parliamentary debate and a vote in the houses of parliament.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action: 
'Do not introduce a Brexit 'reset' bill'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756199
